name: obsidian-auto-dir-plugin
description: This is a sample plugin for Obsidian (https://obsidian.md)

scripts.version: node version-bump.mjs && git add manifest.json versions.json
scripts.link-plugin: copy J:\A6000-各类脚本\obsidian-ppt-plugin\main.js J:\A1000-我的资料\.obsidian\plugins\obsidian-ppt-plugin\main.js
scripts.dev-own: npm run build && npm run link-plugin
